name: Harry Mugridge
bio:
I'm Harry, a Product Manager focused on building user-first products that actually deliver impact.

I've worked across Microsoft, Amazon, and Spotify, mostly at the intersection of product, growth, and customer experience, with a strong focus on experiments and making decisions based on real user insight.

Right now, I'm especially interested in AI-native products and how new tools are changing the way we build.
nowStatus: Welcome to my corner on the internet to build and share ideas.
